mapper.select:
SELECT J.SERVER_ID , J.JOB_ID , J.JOB_NM , J.TABLE_ID , J.SOURCE_PATH , J.SOURCE_FILE , J.INFO_PATH , J.INFO_FILE , J.JOB_TM , J.SCHEDULE_YN , J.SCHEDULE_VALUE , J.ERROR_PATH , J.SOURCE_DEL_YN , J.LAST_COL_YN , J.JOB_CD , J.USE_YN , S.SERVER_NM , T.TABLE_CD , T.TABLE_NM FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_MST J LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO T ON J.TABLE_ID = T.TABLE_ID JOIN mhdb.TB_SERVER S ON J.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND J.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND J.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND (J.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%') OR J.JOB_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%'))
ORDER BY J.JOB_NM

SELECT J.SERVER_ID , J.JOB_NM , H.JOB_ID , H.JOB_TM , H.SOURCE_FILE , H.SOURCE_SIZE , H.SCAN_RECORD , H.SCAN_REG_TM , H.SCAN_REG_TM AS SCAN_END_TM , H.SCAN_STAT_CD , H.SCAN_MSG_CD , H.SCAN_MSG , H.LOAD_REG_TM , H.LOAD_END_TM , H.LOAD_STAT_CD , H.LOAD_MSG_CD , H.LOAD_MSG , H.LOAD_RECORD , H.SCAN_STAT_CD AS SCAN_STAT_NM , C2.DETAIL_NM AS FILTER_STAT_NM , H.LOAD_STAT_CD AS LOAD_STAT_NM , CASE WHEN H.LOAD_STAT_CD IN ('S', '99', '00') THEN COALESCE(H.LOAD_RECORD, 0) ELSE 0 /* Sqream 적재 성공 건수, 전체 건수 - COALESCE(H.LOAD_RECORD, 0) AS PROC_CNT */ END AS LOAD_PROC_CNT , CASE WHEN H.SCAN_STAT_CD IN ('S', '99', '00') THEN COALESCE(H.SCAN_RECORD, 0) ELSE 0 END AS SCAN_PROC_CNT FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST H LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C2 ON H.SCAN_MSG_CD = C2.DETAIL_CD AND 'FILTER_STAT_CD' = C2.GROUP_CD JOIN mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND J.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND J.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
AND H.JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND H.JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359')
AND (H.SCAN_STAT_CD != '00' OR H.LOAD_STAT_CD != '00')
ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC

SELECT J.OUTPUT1_SERVERID , J.OUTPUT2_SERVERID , J.JOB_ID , J.JOB_NM , J.OUTPUT1_TABLEID , (SELECT TABLE_CD FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO WHERE J.OUTPUT1_TABLEID = TABLE_ID) AS TABLE_CD , (SELECT TABLE_CD FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO WHERE J.OUTPUT2_TABLEID = TABLE_ID) AS TABLE_CD2 , (SELECT SERVER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_SERVER G WHERE J.OUTPUT1_SERVERID = G.SERVER_ID) AS OUTPUT1_SERVERNM , (SELECT SERVER_NM FROM mhdb.TB_SERVER G WHERE J.OUTPUT2_SERVERID = G.SERVER_ID) AS OUTPUT2_SERVERNM , J.OUTPUT2_TABLEID , J.SOURCE_PATH , J.SOURCE_FILE , J.OUTPUT1_INFO_PATH , J.OUTPUT1_INFO_FILE , J.OUTPUT2_INFO_PATH , J.OUTPUT2_INFO_FILE , J.JOB_TM , J.SCHEDULE_YN , J.SCHEDULE_VALUE , J.SOURCE_DEL_YN , J.LAST_COL_YN , J.JOB_CD , J.USE_YN FROM mhdb.TB_CONV_JOB_MST J WHERE 1 = 1
AND J.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND (J.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%') OR J.JOB_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%'))
ORDER BY J.JOB_NM

SELECT J.JOB_NM , H.JOB_ID , H.JOB_TM , H.CONVERT_FILE , H.CONVERT_SIZE , H.OUTPUT1_INFO_FILE , H.OUTPUT2_INFO_FILE , H.CONVERT_RECORD , H.CONVERT_REG_TM , H.CONVERT_STAT_CD , H.CONVERT_MSG_CD , H.CONVERT_MSG , J.OUTPUT1_SERVERID , CASE WHEN H.CONVERT_STAT_CD IN ('S', '99', '00') THEN COALESCE(H.CONVERT_RECORD, 0) ELSE 0 /* 변환 처리 건수, 전체 건수 - COALESCE(H.CONVERT_RECORD, 0) AS PROC_CNT */ END AS PROC_CNT FROM mhdb.TB_CONV_JOB_HIST H JOIN mhdb.TB_CONV_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND J.JOB_NM ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
AND H.JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND H.JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359')
AND H.OUTPUT1_INFO_FILE ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{infoFileNm}, '%')
ORDER BY H.JOB_SEQ DESC

SELECT H.JOB_SEQ , H.JOB_ID , J.JOB_NAME , H.JOB_TM , H.START_DATETIME , H.END_DATETIME , H.JOB_STTS , H.JOB_MSG , H.JOB_TYPE , H.SRC_DATA_ROWS , H.DES_DATA_ROWS , H.DES_FILE_PATH , H.DES_JOBTIME , CASE WHEN H.JOB_STTS = 'S' THEN CASE J.DAEMON_ID WHEN 1 THEN COALESCE(H.SRC_DATA_ROWS, 0) WHEN 2 THEN COALESCE(H.SRC_DATA_ROWS, 0) WHEN 3 THEN COALESCE(H.SRC_DATA_ROWS, 0) - COALESCE(H.DES_DATA_ROWS, 0) ELSE COALESCE(H.SRC_DATA_ROWS, 0) END ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT FROM mhdb.TB_DB_JOB_HIST H JOIN mhdb.TB_DB_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND J.DAEMON_ID = #{daemonId}::integer
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND J.JOB_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
AND H.JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND H.JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359')
ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC

SELECT H.JOB_SEQ , H.JOB_ID , J.JOB_NAME , H.JOB_TM , H.START_DATETIME , H.END_DATETIME , H.JOB_STTS , H.JOB_MSG , H.JOB_TYPE , H.SRC_DATA_ROWS , H.DES_DATA_ROWS , H.DES_FILE_PATH , H.DES_JOBTIME , H.DES_FILE_PATH AS DES_JOBFILE FROM mhdb.TB_DB_JOB_HIST H JOIN mhdb.TB_DB_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID JOIN mhdb.TB_DAEMON K ON H.MDFY_DAEMON = K.DAEMON_CD WHERE 1 = 1 AND J.DAEMON_ID = '2' AND replace(H.DES_JOBTIME,'-','') = #{jobDate} ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC

SELECT J.SERVER_ID , J.JOB_NM , H.JOB_ID , H.JOB_TM , H.SOURCE_FILE , H.SOURCE_SIZE , H.SCAN_REG_TM , H.SCAN_END_TM , H.SCAN_STAT_CD , H.SCAN_MSG_CD , H.SCAN_MSG , H.FILTER_REG_TM , H.FILTER_END_TM , H.FILTER_STAT_CD , H.FILTER_MSG_CD , H.FILTER_MSG , H.LOAD_REG_TM , H.LOAD_END_TM , H.LOAD_STAT_CD , H.LOAD_MSG_CD , H.LOAD_MSG , H.SCAN_STAT_CD AS SCAN_STAT_NM , C2.DETAIL_NM AS FILTER_STAT_NM , H.LOAD_STAT_CD AS LOAD_STAT_NM FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY H LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C2 ON H.SCAN_MSG_CD = C2.DETAIL_CD AND 'FILTER_STAT_CD' = C2.GROUP_CD JOIN mhdb.TB_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND J.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND J.JOB_ID = #{jobId}::integer
AND H.JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND H.JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') AND J.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
AND (H.SCAN_STAT_CD != '00' OR H.FILTER_STAT_CD != '00' OR H.LOAD_STAT_CD != '00')
ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC

SELECT STEP, SUM(C1) AS TARGET, SUM(C2) AS FINISH, SUM(C3) AS ERROR, SUM(C4) AS RESTART, MAX(DETAIL_NM) AS STEP_NM FROM ( SELECT '1' AS STEP,COUNT(*) AS C1, 0 AS C2, 0 AS C3, 0 AS C4 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE (SCAN_STAT_CD IS NOT NULL AND SCAN_STAT_CD != '') AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, COUNT(*),0 , 0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD != '99' AND SCAN_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',COUNT(*), 0, 0,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, COUNT(*),0 ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND FILTER_STAT_CD != '99' AND FILTER_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',COUNT(*), 0, 0,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, COUNT(*),0 ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND LOAD_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND LOAD_STAT_CD != '99' AND LOAD_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST WHERE LOAD_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') ) T1, mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL T2 WHERE T1.STEP = T2.DETAIL_CD AND T2.GROUP_CD ='STEP' GROUP BY STEP ORDER BY STEP

SELECT (L.LICENSE/1024) AS LICENSE , TRUNC(CAST((H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024 as numeric),4) AS SOURCE_SIZE , TRUNC(CAST(((L.LICENSE/1024) - (H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024) as numeric),4) AS FREE_SIZE , TRUNC(CAST(CEIL((H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024) / (L.LICENSE/1024) * 100 as numeric),4) AS RATE FROM (SELECT SUM(SOURCE_SIZE) AS SOURCE_SIZE FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST) H, (SELECT SUM(LICENSE) AS LICENSE FROM mhdb.TB_CONFIG) L

SELECT S.SERVER_NM , H.SOURCE_FILE , H.JOB_TM , H.SCAN_END_TM , H.FILTER_END_TM , H.LOAD_END_TM , (H.SCAN_MSG||' '||H.FILTER_MSG||' '||H.LOAD_MSG) AS MSG FROM mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_HIST H JOIN mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID JOIN mhdb.TB_SERVER S ON J.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND H.JOB_TM >= #{jobTmFrom} AND H.JOB_TM <= #{jobTmTo} ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC

SELECT STEP, SUM(C1) AS TARGET, SUM(C2) AS FINISH, SUM(C3) AS ERROR, SUM(C4) AS RESTART, MAX(DETAIL_NM) AS STEP_NM FROM ( SELECT '1' AS STEP,COUNT(*) AS C1, 0 AS C2, 0 AS C3, 0 AS C4 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE (SCAN_STAT_CD IS NOT NULL AND SCAN_STAT_CD != '') AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, COUNT(*),0 , 0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD != '99' AND SCAN_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '1',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',COUNT(*), 0, 0,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, COUNT(*),0 ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE SCAN_STAT_CD = '99' AND FILTER_STAT_CD != '99' AND FILTER_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '2',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',COUNT(*), 0, 0,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, COUNT(*),0 ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND LOAD_STAT_CD = '99' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, 0, COUNT(*) ,0 FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE FILTER_STAT_CD = '99' AND LOAD_STAT_CD != '99' AND LOAD_MSG_CD = 'E' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') UNION ALL SELECT '3',0, 0,0, COUNT(*) FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY WHERE LOAD_STAT_CD = '44' AND JOB_TM >= CONCAT(#{jobTmFrom}, '0000') AND JOB_TM <= CONCAT(#{jobTmTo}, '2359') ) T1, mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL T2 WHERE T1.STEP = T2.DETAIL_CD AND T2.GROUP_CD ='STEP' GROUP BY STEP ORDER BY STEP

SELECT (L.LICENSE/1024) AS LICENSE , TRUNC(CAST((H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024 as numeric),4) AS SOURCE_SIZE , TRUNC(CAST(((L.LICENSE/1024) - (H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024) as numeric),4) AS FREE_SIZE , TRUNC(CAST(CEIL((H.SOURCE_SIZE)/1024/1024/1024) / (L.LICENSE/1024) * 100 as numeric),4) AS RATE FROM (SELECT SUM(SOURCE_SIZE) AS SOURCE_SIZE FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY) H, (SELECT SUM(LICENSE) AS LICENSE FROM mhdb.TB_CONFIG) L

SELECT S.SERVER_NM , H.SOURCE_FILE , H.JOB_TM , H.SCAN_END_TM , H.FILTER_END_TM , H.LOAD_END_TM , (H.SCAN_MSG||' '||H.FILTER_MSG||' '||H.LOAD_MSG) AS MSG FROM mhdb.TB_JOB_HISTORY H JOIN mhdb.TB_JOB_MST J ON H.JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID JOIN mhdb.TB_SERVER S ON J.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND H.JOB_TM >= #{jobTmFrom} AND H.JOB_TM <= #{jobTmTo} ORDER BY H.JOB_TM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_LOAD_JOB_MST (SERVER_ID, JOB_CD, JOB_NM, TABLE_ID, SOURCE_PATH, SOURCE_FILE, INFO_PATH, INFO_FILE, JOB_TM, SCHEDULE_YN, SCHEDULE_VALUE, ERROR_PATH, SOURCE_DEL_YN, LAST_COL_YN, USE_YN) VALUES (#{server_id}::integer, #{job_cd}, #{job_nm}, #{table_id}::integer, #{source_path}, #{source_file}, #{info_path}, #{info_file}, #{job_tm}, #{schedule_yn}, #{schedule_value}, #{error_path}, #{source_del_yn}, #{last_col_yn}, #{use_yn})

INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_CONV_JOB_MST (OUTPUT1_SERVERID, OUTPUT2_SERVERID, JOB_CD, JOB_NM, OUTPUT1_TABLEID, OUTPUT2_TABLEID, SOURCE_PATH, SOURCE_FILE, OUTPUT1_INFO_PATH, OUTPUT2_INFO_PATH, OUTPUT1_INFO_FILE, OUTPUT2_INFO_FILE, JOB_TM, SCHEDULE_YN, SCHEDULE_VALUE, SOURCE_DEL_YN, LAST_COL_YN, USE_YN) VALUES (#{output1_server_id}::integer, #{output2_server_id}::integer, #{job_cd}, #{job_nm}, #{table_id}::integer, #{table_id2}::integer, #{source_path}, #{source_file}, #{info_path}, #{info_path2}, #{info_file}, #{info_file2}, #{job_tm}, #{schedule_yn}, #{schedule_value}, #{source_del_yn}, #{last_col_yn}, #{use_yn})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mhdb.TB_CONV_JOB_MST WHERE JOB_ID = NULLIF(#{jobId}, '')::integer
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_DB_JOB_MST (SRC_SERVER_ID, JOB_NAME, DAEMON_ID, DELIMITER, SRC_TABLE_ID, DES_FILE_PATH, DES_FLAG_PATH, BASE_DATE, JOB_SCHEDULE, JOB_TYPE, USE_YN, DES_TABLE_ID, DES_SERVER_ID) VALUES (#{src_server_id}::integer, #{job_nm}, #{daemon_id}, #{delimiter}, #{src_table_id}::integer, #{des_file_path}, #{des_flag_path}, #{base_date}, #{job_schedule}, #{job_type}, #{use_yn}, #{des_table_id}::integer, #{des_server_id}::integer)
